# Concept Prototype Contract

## Inputs

- `reports/semantic-core.json`
- `docs/site-structure.md`
- project brief or wiki context
- business facts and must-include ideas
- existing-site content when redesigning

## Outputs

- `docs/site-concept.md`
- `reports/business-concept-feedback.json`
- `reports/concept-conflicts.md`
- optional disposable wireframe/prototype path

## Conflict Rules

Route to council when:

- SEO wants content that harms comprehension;
- business claims lack proof;
- visible facts conflict with design direction;
- the concept cannot support the primary user journey;
- semantic and business priorities disagree.
